title: ［再開突發］前線醫生秘方應對發夢後遺症!!

replies.msg:
有醫生朋友間唔時上前線，知道好多人發完夢可能呼吸困難同成身比火燒，叫我話大家聽點用秘方紓緩發夢後遺症，佢自己試過都有用。

1. 用曼秀雷敦對付比火燒既感覺

根據香港中毒諮詢中心最近既指引，催淚彈主要成份係chlorobenzalmalononitrile，又名CS催淚性毒氣，翻查文獻發現CS 會同一個叫TRPA1既痛覺感受器(nociceptor)發生反應，引致皮膚灼痛既感覺。胡椒噴霧有令一隻成分Oleoresin capsicum (OC)，但最後都係會trigger到TRPA1，而曼秀雷敦軟膏入面既menthol，可以抑制到TRPA1，暫時紓緩灼痛。

建議大家用大量清水/生理鹽水清洗後，揸一層薄既係受影響既皮膚上面，記得係大量清洗之後，如果唔係殘留既化學物可以透過其他pathway去刺激你既痛覺神經，所以一定要大量清洗！！！

2.用化痰橙粉同消災止痛藥對付肺部症狀

橙粉(Flumicil)主要成分有NAC(N-acetyl cysteine)，雖然唔可以減輕症狀，但可以保護到個肺唔受更多傷害。呼吸困難同氣喘可能係肺炎(pneumonitis)引起，呢個時候用呼入性類固醇(哮喘病人會有，需醫生處方)或者NSAIDs(非類固醇消炎止痛藥)都可以幫到手。不過呢兩隻藥都有副作用，大家千祈千祈唔好自己買！就算有啲藥房有賣都千祈唔好！長期服用NSAIDs可引致胃潰瘍同腎衰竭，所以唔好長期食呀！

當然無臨床實驗去証實以上既秘方，不過都係結合前線經驗同molecular level理論既建議，希望幫到大家。

光復香港，時代革命。








https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC5096012/

推
811
1. 尖沙咀瞄頭射，射爆女仕眼球
2. 以化學武器攻擊葵芳/太古車站內
3. 北角無視黑幫攻擊記者/平民
4. 非公職時參與非法集會，以磚/汽油彈攻擊防暴警犬，煽動民眾
5. 製造偽証

quote.msg: 有敏感反應當刻食粒Antihistamine 應該可以紓緩到？

replies.msg:
Antihistamine 抗組織胺 = 抗敏感藥
最常見係俗稱「黃丸仔」嘅Piriton
或者第二代如Clarityne 佳力天，Zyrtec 治敏速

依幾款藥都可以係有藥房嘅普通萬寧屈記買到
幾十蚊有一盒

A high dose of menthol will lead to reversible channel block of TRPA1. However, a study suggest submicromolar or low micromolar level of menthol can cause channel activation.
Karashima Y, et al. Bimodal action of menthol in the transient receptor potential channel TRPA1. Journal of neuroscience. 27:37 9874-9884 2007

我查返NIH toxicology database 呢， 係咁寫: [https://toxnet.nlm.nih.gov/cgi-bin/sis/search/a?dbs+hsdb:@term+@DOCNO+4346]
//
MANAGEMENT OF MILD TO MODERATE TOXICITY
Remove the patient from the exposure site. Remove all contaminated clothing (wash with soap and cold water/air non-washable items for a few days). Wash exposed areas of body with soap and cold water twice. Irrigate eyes with copious amounts of 0.9% normal saline or water for 15 minutes; if irritation persists perform ophthalmic exam. Symptoms usually resolve within 15 to 30 minutes of cessation of exposure. Minor chemical burns can be treated with soap and cold water along with a topical antibiotic cream. Consider tetanus prophylaxis.

MANAGEMENT OF SEVERE TOXICITY
Consider aggressive airway management for signs of respiratory compromise; treat severe respiratory irritation with bronchodilators and corticosteroids. For more severe dermal burns, contact your local burn center for guidance. Patients with corneal burn or penetration require emergent evaluation by an ophthalmologist.
//
即係眼就用大量水／Normal saline沖， 皮膚要用番梘洗2次.
嚴重當然去睇醫生。
------------------------------------------
樓上講過既TRPA1，我唔清楚， 不過NIH話覺得痛係因為bradykininn 果係pathway。
//
Clinical Effect:
B) TOXICOLOGY:
Lacrimators such as CN and CS gases are alkylating agents, which have activated halogen groups. They bind sulfhydryl groups and fix enzymes. This activity is transient because these enzymes are rapidly reactivated. Tissue injury is thought to be related to enzyme inactivation and pain is bradykinin mediated.
//
CS主要有2個危害：
1. Alkylating.
CS reacts with glutathione, and also lipoic acid and cysteine, and ... the alkylating properties of the molecule are major determinants of the toxicity of CS after intravenous administration. There is also evidence that cyanide contributes to the toxicity of CS.
[Marrs, T.C., Maynard, R.L., Sidell, F.R.; Chemical Warfare Agents. Toxicology and Treatment. John Wiley & Sons, New York, NY. (1996)., p. 225] **PEER REVIEWED**

2. Cyanogenic potential.
MICE RECEIVED O-CHLOROBENZYLIDENE MALONONITRILE BY IP INJECTION (0.5 LD50) OR BY AEROSOL EXPOSURE (20000 MG/MIN/CU M). INCREASED EXCRETION OF THIOCYANATE IN THE URINE WAS OBSERVED, INDICATING A TRANSFORMATION OF CS TO CYANIDE IN VIVO. ([FRANKENBERG L, SORBO B; ARCH TOXIKOL 31 (2): 99 (1973)] **PEER REVIEWED** PubMed Abstract )
-------------------------------
至於Cleanup:
Source: [https://pubchem.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/compound/2-Chlorobenzylidenemalononitrile#section=Spillage-Disposal ]
10.5.3 Cleanup Methods
3. DECONTAMINATE AREA OF SPILL: (A) BY WASHING WITH A 5% SOLUTION OF SODIUM HYDROXIDE IN 50/50 ETHYL ALCOHOL/WATER; OR (B) BY ADDING FLAKE SODIUM HYDROXIDE TO A SOLUTION OR SLURRY OF THE SPILL IN ISOPROPYL ALCOHOL; OR (C) BY COVERING THE SPILL WITH A 10% SOLUTION OF SODIUM HYDROXIDE IN 50/50 ISOPROPYL ALCOHOL/WATER & LETTING STAND 20 MINUTES BEFORE FLUSHING WITH WATER.

[Mackison, F. W., R. S. Stricoff, and L. J. Partridge, Jr. (eds.). NIOSH/OSHA - Occupational Health Guidelines for Chemical Hazards. DHHS(NIOSH) Publication No. 81-123 (3 VOLS). Washington, DC: U.S. Government Printing Office, Jan. 1981.]

811
1. 尖沙咀瞄頭射，射爆女仕眼球
2. 以化學武器攻擊葵芳/太古車站內
3. 北角無視黑幫攻擊記者/平民
4. 非公職時參與非法集會，以磚/汽油彈攻擊防暴警犬，煽動民眾
5. 製造偽証

quote.msg:
我查返NIH toxicology database 呢， 係咁寫: [https://toxnet.nlm.nih.gov/cgi-bin/sis/search/a?dbs+hsdb:@term+@DOCNO+4346]
//
MANAGEMENT OF MILD TO MODERATE TOXICITY
Remove the patient from the exposure site. Remove all contaminated clothing (wash with soap and cold water/air non-washable items for a few days). Wash exposed areas of body with soap and cold water twice. Irrigate eyes with copious amounts of 0.9% normal saline or water for 15 minutes; if irritation persists perform ophthalmic exam. Symptoms usually resolve within 15 to 30 minutes of cessation of exposure. Minor chemical burns can be treated with soap and cold water along with a topical antibiotic cream. Consider tetanus prophylaxis.

MANAGEMENT OF SEVERE TOXICITY
Consider aggressive airway management for signs of respiratory compromise; treat severe respiratory irritation with bronchodilators and corticosteroids. For more severe dermal burns, contact your local burn center for guidance. Patients with corneal burn or penetration require emergent evaluation by an ophthalmologist.
//
即係眼就用大量水／Normal saline沖， 皮膚要用番梘洗2次.
嚴重當然去睇醫生。
------------------------------------------
樓上講過既TRPA1，我唔清楚， 不過NIH話覺得痛係因為bradykininn 果係pathway。
//
Clinical Effect:
B) TOXICOLOGY:
Lacrimators such as CN and CS gases are alkylating agents, which have activated halogen groups. They bind sulfhydryl groups and fix enzymes. This activity is transient because these enzymes are rapidly reactivated. Tissue injury is thought to be related to enzyme inactivation and pain is bradykinin mediated.
//
CS主要有2個危害：
1. Alkylating.
CS reacts with glutathione, and also lipoic acid and cysteine, and ... the alkylating properties of the molecule are major determinants of the toxicity of CS after intravenous administration. There is also evidence that cyanide contributes to the toxicity of CS.
[Marrs, T.C., Maynard, R.L., Sidell, F.R.; Chemical Warfare Agents. Toxicology and Treatment. John Wiley & Sons, New York, NY. (1996)., p. 225] **PEER REVIEWED**

2. Cyanogenic potential.
MICE RECEIVED O-CHLOROBENZYLIDENE MALONONITRILE BY IP INJECTION (0.5 LD50) OR BY AEROSOL EXPOSURE (20000 MG/MIN/CU M). INCREASED EXCRETION OF THIOCYANATE IN THE URINE WAS OBSERVED, INDICATING A TRANSFORMATION OF CS TO CYANIDE IN VIVO. ([FRANKENBERG L, SORBO B; ARCH TOXIKOL 31 (2): 99 (1973)] **PEER REVIEWED** PubMed Abstract )
-------------------------------
至於Cleanup:
Source: [https://pubchem.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/compound/2-Chlorobenzylidenemalononitrile#section=Spillage-Disposal ]
10.5.3 Cleanup Methods
3. DECONTAMINATE AREA OF SPILL: (A) BY WASHING WITH A 5% SOLUTION OF SODIUM HYDROXIDE IN 50/50 ETHYL ALCOHOL/WATER; OR (B) BY ADDING FLAKE SODIUM HYDROXIDE TO A SOLUTION OR SLURRY OF THE SPILL IN ISOPROPYL ALCOHOL; OR (C) BY COVERING THE SPILL WITH A 10% SOLUTION OF SODIUM HYDROXIDE IN 50/50 ISOPROPYL ALCOHOL/WATER & LETTING STAND 20 MINUTES BEFORE FLUSHING WITH WATER.

[Mackison, F. W., R. S. Stricoff, and L. J. Partridge, Jr. (eds.). NIOSH/OSHA - Occupational Health Guidelines for Chemical Hazards. DHHS(NIOSH) Publication No. 81-123 (3 VOLS). Washington, DC: U.S. Government Printing Office, Jan. 1981.]

replies.msg:
同意part one。irrigation只係為左沖走表面多餘既cs大量既水同saline就足夠

part two alkylating properties me唔識費事亂講
Cyanogenic formation 係paper提及過，但係cyanide formation既量係好少d文獻用既講法係two puff of smoke當然聞得多都唔好

part three cleanup 果度用alkaline係為左加速cs hydrolysis，用溫柔d既baking soda都ok。 但係d product都係harmful所以都係要用水沖走佢地

quote.msg:
有醫生朋友間唔時上前線，知道好多人發完夢可能呼吸困難同成身比火燒，叫我話大家聽點用秘方紓緩發夢後遺症，佢自己試過都有用。

1. 用曼秀雷敦對付比火燒既感覺

根據香港中毒諮詢中心最近既指引，催淚彈主要成份係chlorobenzalmalononitrile，又名CS催淚性毒氣，翻查文獻發現CS 會同一個叫TRPA1既痛覺感受器(nociceptor)發生反應，引致皮膚灼痛既感覺。胡椒噴霧有令一隻成分Oleoresin capsicum (OC)，但最後都係會trigger到TRPA1，而曼秀雷敦軟膏入面既menthol，可以抑制到TRPA1，暫時紓緩灼痛。

建議大家用大量清水/生理鹽水清洗後，揸一層薄既係受影響既皮膚上面，記得係大量清洗之後，如果唔係殘留既化學物可以透過其他pathway去刺激你既痛覺神經，所以一定要大量清洗！！！

2.用化痰橙粉同消災止痛藥對付肺部症狀

橙粉(Flumicil)主要成分有NAC(N-acetyl cysteine)，雖然唔可以減輕症狀，但可以保護到個肺唔受更多傷害。呼吸困難同氣喘可能係肺炎(pneumonitis)引起，呢個時候用呼入性類固醇(哮喘病人會有，需醫生處方)或者NSAIDs(非類固醇消炎止痛藥)都可以幫到手。不過呢兩隻藥都有副作用，大家千祈千祈唔好自己買！就算有啲藥房有賣都千祈唔好！長期服用NSAIDs可引致胃潰瘍同腎衰竭，所以唔好長期食呀！

當然無臨床實驗去証實以上既秘方，不過都係結合前線經驗同molecular level理論既建議，希望幫到大家。

光復香港，時代革命。








https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC5096012/

replies.msg:
請問可唔可以俾我用黎製作文宣？
希望可以宣傳俾更多人知

1. 用曼秀雷敦對付比火燒既感覺

根據香港中毒諮詢中心最近既指引，催淚彈主要成份係chlorobenzalmalononitrile，又名CS催淚性毒氣，翻查文獻發現CS 會同一個叫TRPA1既痛覺感受器(nociceptor)發生反應，引致皮膚灼痛既感覺。胡椒噴霧有令一隻成分Oleoresin capsicum (OC)，但最後都係會trigger到TRPA1，而曼秀雷敦軟膏入面既menthol，可以抑制到TRPA1，暫時紓緩灼痛。

建議大家用大量清水/生理鹽水清洗後，揸一層薄既係受影響既皮膚上面，記得係大量清洗之後，如果唔係殘留既化學物可以透過其他pathway去刺激你既痛覺神經，所以一定要大量清洗！！！

2.用化痰橙粉同消災止痛藥對付肺部症狀

橙粉(Flumicil)主要成分有NAC(N-acetyl cysteine)，雖然唔可以減輕症狀，但可以保護到個肺唔受更多傷害。呼吸困難同氣喘可能係肺炎(pneumonitis)引起，呢個時候用呼入性類固醇(哮喘病人會有，需醫生處方)或者NSAIDs(非類固醇消炎止痛藥)都可以幫到手。不過呢兩隻藥都有副作用，大家千祈千祈唔好自己買！就算有啲藥房有賣都千祈唔好！長期服用NSAIDs可引致胃潰瘍同腎衰竭，所以唔好長期食呀！

當然無臨床實驗去証實以上既秘方，不過都係結合前線經驗同molecular level理論既建議，希望幫到大家。

光復香港，時代革命。








https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC5096012/

請問可唔可以俾我用黎製作文宣？
希望可以宣傳俾更多人知

replies.msg: 其實clinical evidence唔多，得NSAID係充份，but if have肺炎最好睇醫生la,太嚴重

quote.msg:
我查返NIH toxicology database 呢， 係咁寫: [https://toxnet.nlm.nih.gov/cgi-bin/sis/search/a?dbs+hsdb:@term+@DOCNO+4346]
//
MANAGEMENT OF MILD TO MODERATE TOXICITY
Remove the patient from the exposure site. Remove all contaminated clothing (wash with soap and cold water/air non-washable items for a few days). Wash exposed areas of body with soap and cold water twice. Irrigate eyes with copious amounts of 0.9% normal saline or water for 15 minutes; if irritation persists perform ophthalmic exam. Symptoms usually resolve within 15 to 30 minutes of cessation of exposure. Minor chemical burns can be treated with soap and cold water along with a topical antibiotic cream. Consider tetanus prophylaxis.

MANAGEMENT OF SEVERE TOXICITY
Consider aggressive airway management for signs of respiratory compromise; treat severe respiratory irritation with bronchodilators and corticosteroids. For more severe dermal burns, contact your local burn center for guidance. Patients with corneal burn or penetration require emergent evaluation by an ophthalmologist.
//
即係眼就用大量水／Normal saline沖， 皮膚要用番梘洗2次.
嚴重當然去睇醫生。
------------------------------------------
樓上講過既TRPA1，我唔清楚， 不過NIH話覺得痛係因為bradykininn 果係pathway。
//
Clinical Effect:
B) TOXICOLOGY:
Lacrimators such as CN and CS gases are alkylating agents, which have activated halogen groups. They bind sulfhydryl groups and fix enzymes. This activity is transient because these enzymes are rapidly reactivated. Tissue injury is thought to be related to enzyme inactivation and pain is bradykinin mediated.
//
CS主要有2個危害：
1. Alkylating.
CS reacts with glutathione, and also lipoic acid and cysteine, and ... the alkylating properties of the molecule are major determinants of the toxicity of CS after intravenous administration. There is also evidence that cyanide contributes to the toxicity of CS.
[Marrs, T.C., Maynard, R.L., Sidell, F.R.; Chemical Warfare Agents. Toxicology and Treatment. John Wiley & Sons, New York, NY. (1996)., p. 225] **PEER REVIEWED**

2. Cyanogenic potential.
MICE RECEIVED O-CHLOROBENZYLIDENE MALONONITRILE BY IP INJECTION (0.5 LD50) OR BY AEROSOL EXPOSURE (20000 MG/MIN/CU M). INCREASED EXCRETION OF THIOCYANATE IN THE URINE WAS OBSERVED, INDICATING A TRANSFORMATION OF CS TO CYANIDE IN VIVO. ([FRANKENBERG L, SORBO B; ARCH TOXIKOL 31 (2): 99 (1973)] **PEER REVIEWED** PubMed Abstract )
-------------------------------
至於Cleanup:
Source: [https://pubchem.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/compound/2-Chlorobenzylidenemalononitrile#section=Spillage-Disposal ]
10.5.3 Cleanup Methods
3. DECONTAMINATE AREA OF SPILL: (A) BY WASHING WITH A 5% SOLUTION OF SODIUM HYDROXIDE IN 50/50 ETHYL ALCOHOL/WATER; OR (B) BY ADDING FLAKE SODIUM HYDROXIDE TO A SOLUTION OR SLURRY OF THE SPILL IN ISOPROPYL ALCOHOL; OR (C) BY COVERING THE SPILL WITH A 10% SOLUTION OF SODIUM HYDROXIDE IN 50/50 ISOPROPYL ALCOHOL/WATER & LETTING STAND 20 MINUTES BEFORE FLUSHING WITH WATER.

[Mackison, F. W., R. S. Stricoff, and L. J. Partridge, Jr. (eds.). NIOSH/OSHA - Occupational Health Guidelines for Chemical Hazards. DHHS(NIOSH) Publication No. 81-123 (3 VOLS). Washington, DC: U.S. Government Printing Office, Jan. 1981.]
